decision_summary.rationale: Applying a lifecycle policy to transition objects older than 90 days to Glacier Instant Retrieval is the optimal cost-saving measure for this S3 bucket.

llm_response.technical_explanation: The S3 bucket 'company-data-archive-prod' contains 84.7% of objects older than 90 days, which is a significant portion of the total data. Transitioning these objects to Glacier Instant Retrieval will reduce storage costs from $42.38/month to $8.29/month, resulting in a monthly savings of $34.09. This action is safe and does not pose any data loss or pipeline disruption risks.

terraform_validate.name: terraform_validate
terraform_validate.details: Passed (undeclared-reference errors ignored — missing sibling resources are expected in eval workspace)

checkov.name: checkov
checkov.details: No applicable Checkov checks for this resource type

nl_quality.name: nl_quality
nl_quality.details: Numbers are internally consistent and resource-specific, but the explanation omits the total object count (84,320), never mentions the requirement for a separate aws_s3_bucket_lifecycle_configuration resource, skips noncurrent version transitions, and the rationale lacks any comparison to alternative actions.
